about.title: About Our Company
about.description1: EvolaTech is more than a development agency; we are your technical partners. We believe that web software should be as enduring and precise as classical architecture.
about.description2: We focus on clean code and smart connectivity, helping companies bridge the gap between complex business logic and intuitive user experiences.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: EvolaTech provides IT consulting, custom software development, API integrations, cloud infrastructure setup, and ongoing technical support. All services are subject to a separate written agreement unless otherwise stated.

sections.heading: Payment Terms
sections.body: Invoices are due within 14 days of issuance unless agreed otherwise in writing. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. Project commencement may require an upfront deposit as specified in the project agreement.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Upon full payment, clients receive ownership of all custom deliverables created for them. EvolaTech retains the right to use general methodologies, frameworks, and non-client-specific know-how developed during the engagement.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.body: Either party may terminate an engagement with 30 days written notice. In the event of material breach, immediate termination is permitted. Fees for work completed up to the termination date remain due.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of competent jurisdiction in Poland.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For questions regarding these terms, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: EvolaTech is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.heading: Data Controller
sections.body: EvolaTech is the data controller responsible for your personal data. Contact: evolateam{'@'}gmail.com, Phone: +48 789 711 631.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide when contacting us (name, email, phone, project details). We also collect technical data such as IP address and browser type via server logs for security purposes.

sections.heading: Legal Basis
sections.body: Processing is based on your consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)), the performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)), and our legitimate interests in maintaining secure and functional services (Art. 6(1)(f)).

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described above, or as required by law. Contact enquiries are stored for up to 2 years unless a contract relationship follows.

sections.heading: Third Parties
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We may share data with trusted service providers (e.g. hosting and email) under data processing agreements. These providers are bound by confidentiality obligations.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and object to the use of your data. You also have the right to data portability and to withdraw consent at any time.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.

gdpr.title: GDPR
gdpr.intro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation), EvolaTech upholds the highest standards for protecting personal data.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to: access your personal data; rectify inaccurate data; request erasure ('right to be forgotten'); restrict or object to certain processing; receive your data in a portable format; and withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

sections.heading: How to Exercise Your Rights
sections.body: Submit your request in writing to evolateam{'@'}gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days. Identity verification may be required to protect your data.

sections.heading: Supervisory Authority
sections.body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish supervisory authority: Urząd Ochrony Danych Osobowych (UODO), ul. Stawki 2, 00-193 Warsaw, Poland.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For GDPR-related requests, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.
